'''Vam Margan''' was a [[Major/Legends|Major]], stationed on [[Vergesso Base]] where he commanded a battalion of Natori Association soldiers.<ref name="guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>
==History==
Margan was a former special missions [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] commander in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] before he resigned his commission for personal reasons, and joined the [[Natori Association]] around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].<ref>The ''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]'' mentions that he resigned the Imperial Army "three years ago". According to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', the events of ''[[Shadows of the Empire]]'', including the [[Battle of the Bajic Shipyards]], occurred in [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]], therefore this happened in 0 ABY.</ref> Margan avoided talking about his past, and it remained unknown why he resigned and how he avoided the attention of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] and [[Ubiqtorate/Legends|Ubiqtorate]].<ref name="guide" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] he had the rank of [[Major/Legends|Major]] and was stationed on [[Vergesso Base]] where he commanded a [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] of Natori Association soldiers.<ref>''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref> 

In the aftermath of the [[battle of the Bajic Shipyards]], Margan and [[Nim Zanti]] happened to be at the [[Base Operations Center]] and survived the disaster in the fortified bunker. Gathering the survivors, they led them through the [[turbolift/Legends|turbolift]] maintenance ladders to the upper levels. Reaching [[the Life]], they were under attack by a [[squad/Legends|squad]] of confused, space-suited mercenaries, before Margan ordered them to cease fire. Before reaching [[the Facility]], they encountered a squad of [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetroopers]].<Ref name="lights">{{WEGCite|story=Will the Last Person Leaving Vergesso Turn Off the Lights?|book=Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide}}</ref>

Making their way to the asteroid surface, they found a [[platoon/Legends|platoon]] of spacetroopers; they managed to steal and hijack their [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|assault shuttle]], guarded by bored and unexpecting crewmen. As the shuttle was heading to open space, the Imperials realized that something was wrong and sent [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE]]s to destroy it.<Ref name="lights" />

==Personality and traits==
Margan was a hard-nosed practical man with a deep concern for the safety of the men under his command. He was an honorable man who was dedicated to fulfilling his contracts.<ref name="guide" />
==Behind the scenes==
The scenario ''[[Will the Last Person Leaving Vergesso Turn Off the Lights?]]'' allows the option to have Vim Zanti and/or Vam Margan among the suvivors of the Battle, that might lead the team of survivors. This article assumes that Margan had this role.
